file_insights.changes: Replaced stub implementation with complete test orchestration and output formatting
key_additions: formatted output with symbols (✓/⊘) and status messages
proper exit codes based on test outcomes

patterns_discovered.description: Each adapter test follows: create_test_setup → write_template → create_test_card → start_dispatcher → wait_for_completion → stop_dispatcher → assert_result → cleanup_test_setup
Try-catch blocks at multiple nesting levels ensure cleanup_test_setup is called even when intermediate steps fail
Uses `mut results = []` and `$results = ($results | append [$result])` to collect outcomes from multiple test iterations
Adapter list determined at runtime: if 'all' then test 4 adapters, else test single adapter
Uses conditional symbols (✓ for pass, ⊘ for fail) with standardized status text and optional reason messages

gotchas_discovered.description: sleep 500ms added between start_dispatcher and wait_for_card_completion to give dispatcher time to initialize
Must verify adapter_path exists before attempting to run it; missing check causes test to fail silently
Each error path must call cleanup_test_setup before returning result record, or temporary directories leak
Uses `date now | format date '%s'` to ensure card IDs don't collide; rapid sequential calls could theoretically collide
Script exits early if bop binary doesn't exist after build; this prevents silent failures but requires build to succeed

approach_outcome.description: Implemented main test orchestration and output formatting
key_accomplishments: Proper resource cleanup with error handling
Human-readable formatted output with result symbols
Correct exit code handling for CI/CD integration

recommendations.suggestion: Add detailed step-by-step logging between key operations (post-build, post-setup, post-adapter-run) for better troubleshooting of test failures
Implement configurable retry logic for flaky adapter tests; currently no retry mechanism if tests fail intermittently
Consider parallel adapter testing instead of sequential; current design tests adapters one-by-one which increases total runtime
Add validation of timeout_sec parameter (e.g., minimum value check, warn if exceeds threshold) to catch configuration errors early
Add JSON output mode for machine-readable test results; current format is human-readable but lacks structured output for CI systems
